SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io.catalog

Class Catalog

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.catalog.Catalog
public class Catalog extends Object
Manages catalog entries. To be used to: - delete/define files (VSAM and NONVSAM) - rebuild indexes on KSDS - obtain information about a file

  • Constructor Details

    • Catalog

      public Catalog(Context ctx, Configuration config) throws CatalogException
      Constructs a Catalog using the provided context.
      Parameters:
      ctx - The context used to initialize the catalog manager.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during initialization.

    • Catalog

      public Catalog(BatchContext ctx) throws CatalogException
      Throws:
      CatalogException

    • Catalog

      Throws:

  • Method Details

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the catalog manager.

    • retrieve

      public FileDescriptor retrieve(String dsn) throws CatalogEntryNotFoundException, CatalogException
      Retrieves information about a file in the default catalog
      Parameters:
      dsn -
      Returns:
      the FileDescriptor describing the file
      Throws:
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      CatalogException

    • retrieve

      public FileDescriptor retrieve(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogEntryNotFoundException, CatalogException
      retrieves information about a file in the specified catalog
      Parameters:
      dsn -
      catalog -
      Returns:
      the FileDescriptor describing the file
      Throws:
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      CatalogException

    • retrieve

      public FileDescriptor retrieve(String dsn, String catalog, boolean resolvePath) throws CatalogEntryNotFoundException, CatalogException
      Retrieves information about a file with the specified data set name and catalog. If resolvePath is set to true and the retrieved file descriptor represents a path rather than a direct entry, it resolves the path by retrieving the related entry from the catalog.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The data set name of the file to retrieve.
      catalog - The catalog in which to search for the file.
      resolvePath - Indicates whether to resolve paths by retrieving related entries.
      Returns:
      The FileDescriptor describing the retrieved file, or null if not found.
      Throws:
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry is not found.
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during retrieval.

    • initialize

      protected void initialize() throws CatalogException
      Throws:
      CatalogException

    • store

      public void store(FileDescriptor fd) throws DuplicatedCatalogEntryException, CatalogException
      Stores a file entry in the catalog
      Parameters:
      fd -
      Throws:
      DuplicatedCatalogEntryException
      CatalogException

    • define

      public void define(FileDescriptor fd) throws DuplicatedCatalogEntryException, CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Defines a file in catalog. For VSAM files also create the necessary storage storage objects
      Parameters:
      fd - the FileDescriptor of the file to define
      Throws:
      DuplicatedCatalogEntryException
      CatalogException
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException

    • delete

      public void delete(String dsn) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Deletes the catalog entry identified by the given dataset name from the default catalog.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name of the catalog entry to be deleted.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during the deletion operation.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry to be deleted is not found.

    • delete

      public void delete(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Deletes the catalog entry identified by the given dataset name and catalog name.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name of the catalog entry to be deleted.
      catalog - The name of the catalog containing the entry to be deleted.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during the deletion operation.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry to be deleted is not found.

    • erase

      public void erase(String dsn) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Erases the specified file in the default catalog
      Parameters:
      dsn -
      Throws:
      CatalogException
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException

    • erase

      public void erase(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      erases the specified file in the specified catalog
      Parameters:
      dsn - the dsn of the file to erase
      catalog - the dataset's catalog
      Throws:
      CatalogException
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException

    • exists

      public boolean exists(String dsn) throws CatalogException
      Checks if a data set name (dsn) entry exists in the default catalog.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The data set name to check for existence.
      Returns:
      true if the entry exists in the default catalog, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      CatalogException

    • exists

      public boolean exists(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogException
      checks if a dsn entry exists in the specified catalog
      Parameters:
      dsn - The data set name to check for existence.
      catalog - The dataset's catalog
      Throws:
      CatalogException

    • update

      public void update(FileDescriptor fd) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Updates a catalog entry with the information provided in the given FileDescriptor.
      Parameters:
      fd - The FileDescriptor containing the updated information for the catalog entry.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during the update operation.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry to be updated is not found.

    • rebuildIndexes

      public void rebuildIndexes(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogEntryNotFoundException, CatalogException
      Rebuilds KSDS indexes
      Parameters:
      dsn - the DSN of the dataset to be rebuilt
      catalog - the dataset catalog
      Throws:
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      CatalogException

      Counts the records in a dataset
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      number of records in the dataset
      Throws:
      CatalogException
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException

      Returns:

      Throws:
      CatalogException

      Parameters:

      catalog - the dataset catalog
      Returns:
      number of records in the dataset

      Throws:
      IOException

    • readAllEbcdicAsString

      public String readAllEbcdicAsString(String dsn) throws IOException
      Reads all the records in a dataset, converts EBCDIC to ASCII and returns them as a String
      Parameters:
      dsn -
      Returns:
      the file content
      Throws:
      IOException

    • readAllEbcdicAsString

      public String readAllEbcdicAsString(String dsn, String catalog) throws IOException
      Reads all the records in a dataset, converts EBCDIC to ASCII and returns them as a String
      Parameters:
      dsn -
      catalog -
      Returns:
      the file content
      Throws:
      IOException

    • list

      public List<FileDescriptor> list(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Retrieves a list of file descriptors associated with the specified dataset name and catalog.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name for which file descriptors are to be retrieved.
      catalog - The name of the catalog from which to retrieve file descriptors.
      Returns:
      A list of file descriptors associated with the specified dataset name and catalog.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during the retrieval process.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry is not found.

    • getGdg

      public FileDescriptor getGdg(FileDescriptor gdgBase, int version) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Retrieves a specific version of a generation data group (GDG) based on the provided GDG base and version number.
      Parameters:
      gdgBase - The GDG base file descriptor.
      version - The version number of the GDG to retrieve.
      Returns:
      The file descriptor representing the specified version of the GDG.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during the retrieval process.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry is not found.

    • copy

      public long copy(FileDescriptor inFd, FileDescriptor outFd)
      Copies data from one file descriptor to another.
      Parameters:
      inFd - The input file descriptor.
      outFd - The output file descriptor.
      Returns:
      The number of records copied.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the copy function is not activated by program context.

    • copy

      public long copy(FileDescriptor inFd, FileDescriptor outFd, boolean append, Integer limit)
      Copies data from one file descriptor to another with optional append and record limit.
      Parameters:
      inFd - The input file descriptor.
      outFd - The output file descriptor.
      append - Whether to append data to the output file.
      limit - The maximum number of records to copy, or null if no limit.
      Returns:
      The number of records copied.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the copy function is not activated by program context.

    • copy

      public long copy(FileDescriptor inFd, FileDescriptor outFd, boolean append, Integer limit, int skip)
      Copies data from one file descriptor to another with optional append and record limit.
      Parameters:
      inFd - The input file descriptor.
      outFd - The output file descriptor.
      append - Whether to append data to the output file.
      limit - The maximum number of records to copy, or null if no limit.
      skip - The number of records to skip
      Returns:
      The number of records copied.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the copy function is not activated by program context.

    • buildFile

      public AbstractFile buildFile(FileDescriptor fd)
      Builds an AbstractFile object based on the provided FileDescriptor.
      Parameters:
      fd - The FileDescriptor describing the file.
      Returns:
      The constructed AbstractFile object.
